entities.girl: a girl reading her graded essay

scenes.title: The Graded Essay
scenes.background_prompt: A school desk with a marked-up paper, a pencil case, a textbook, and a window showing a schoolyard. No people.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A classroom after school. A girl of about twelve with a brown ponytail and a denim jacket sits at a desk by the window, holding a graded essay in both hands. The paper has neat handwriting but is covered in the teacher's red ink marks — circled words, underlined phrases, and marginal comments. One prominent red circle surrounds the word 'becuz' with the correction 'because' written beside it in red. The girl studies the corrections with a focused, slightly frustrated expression, biting her lower lip. A pencil case and an English textbook sit on the desk. Through the window, the empty schoolyard is visible with a basketball hoop and painted lines. The afternoon sun casts long shadows across the desk. Other desks around her are empty — she stayed behind to review.
scenes.composition_instructions: Place girl at the desk by the window, sitting and holding a graded essay covered in red marks. Her expression focused, slightly frustrated, biting lower lip.
